zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Beaumont於1409年出生時，他的父親Henry de Beaumont29歲，母親Elizabeth Willoughby25歲。他於1425年8月2日與Elizabeth Phelip在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1460年登記服兵役。他於1450年被列為lord great chamberlain。他去世於1460年7月10日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Beaumont was born in 1409, his father, Henry de Beaumont, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Willoughby, was 25. He married Elizabeth Phelip on 2 August 1425, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1460. In 1450, at the age of 41, his occupation is listed as lord great chamberlain. He died on 10 July 1460, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Beaumont est né en 1409, son père, Henry de Beaumont, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Willoughby, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Phelip le 2 août 1425, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1460. En 1450, à l’âge de 41 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord great chamberlain. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1460, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Beaumont 1409 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Beaumont 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Willoughby 25. Er hat am 2. Er hat sich 1460 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1450, als er 41 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord great chamberlain aufgeführt. Er starb am 10. Juli 1460 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Beaumont è nato il nel 1409, il suo padre, Henry de Beaumont, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Willoughby, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Phelip il 2 agosto 1425, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1460. Nel 1450, all'età di 41 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord great chamberlain. Morì il 10 luglio 1460, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Beaumontが1409年に生まれた時，父Henry de Beaumontは29歳，母Elizabeth Willoughbyは25歳であった。1425年8月2日にイギリスイギリスでElizabeth Phelipと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1460年に兵役登録をした。1450年，41歳の時，職業はlord great chamberlainと記録されている。彼は1460年7月10日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Beaumont(이)가 1409년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Beaumont(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Willoughby(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1425년 8월 2일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth Phelip(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1450년, 41세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord great chamberlain이었다. 그는 1460년 7월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Beaumont nasceu em 1409, seu pai, Henry de Beaumont, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Willoughby, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Phelip em 2 de agosto de 1425, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1460. Em 1450, com 41 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord great chamberlain. Ele faleceu em 10 de julho de 1460, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.Barton, Segrave, Northamptonshire, Engla: бартон, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Beaumont родился в 1409 г., его отцу по имени Henry de Beaumont было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Willoughby, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Phelip 2 августа 1425 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1460 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1450 году, в возрасте 41 год, работал по профессии lord great chamberlain. Он умер 10 июля 1460 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Beaumont nació en 1409, su papá, Henry de Beaumont, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Willoughby, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Phelip el 2 de agosto de 1425, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1460. En 1450, a la edad de 41 años, su ocupación registrada era lord great chamberlain. Murió el 10 de julio de 1460, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
